summary: Iteration 3 testing complete - Alliance application system successfully removed and replaced with informational Alliance Process section + Discord CTA. Emblem containers and crimson accent styling verified. All 7 backend tests pass, all frontend tests pass.
critical_code_review_comments: Alliance application system (POST /api/alliances/apply, GET /api/alliances/applications) correctly removed - returns 404
ApplyDialog component fully removed - no apply-dialog or apply-submit-button testids exist
Emblem container correctly styled: 56x56, #151A20 bg, 12px radius, subtle gold ring (box-shadow inset)
Crimson accent #8B0000 correctly used ONLY for active states (badge-active, nav-active-marker)
Discord button in navbar with correct href, target=_blank, rel=noopener noreferrer
Alliance Process section has 4 numbered steps with correct titles
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 verified: (1) Alliance apply system REMOVED - POST /api/alliances/apply and GET /api/alliances/applications return 404. (2) ApplyDialog component removed - no form fields or submit buttons on any page. (3) Navbar has Discord button (data-testid='nav-discord-button') with href=https://discord.gg/yazanaki, target=_blank, rel=noopener noreferrer. (4) Alliance Process section on /alliances page has 4 steps (data-testid='alliance-process-step-1' through 4) with titles: Contact via Discord, Submit faction details, Negotiation, Agreement finalized. (5) Discord CTA (data-testid='alliance-discord-cta') is an <a> link, not a button that opens modal. (6) Home page alliance preview has Discord link (data-testid='alliance-preview-discord'). (7) Emblem containers (data-testid='clan-emblem-{code}' and 'alliance-emblem-excalibur') have correct CSS: 56x56, #151A20 bg, 12px radius, gold ring box-shadow. (8) Crimson #8B0000 used for badge-active (Alliance/Member Active status) and nav-active-marker (active route dot). All pages (Home, Clans, Alliances, Systems, Registry) render correctly with no console errors.
